issues.title: New JSON schema generation includes ToolContext, while old implementation skips it.

comments.body: Good catch! Thanks for reporting this. I'll have a look and fix it.

> Good catch! Thanks for reporting this. I'll have a look and fix it.

Is there any progress on this issue? Will it be resolved in 1.0.0-GA?
By the end of this week, the fix should land in 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT and then be included in the upcoming 1.0.0-M7 release.
